diagrams.title: Slow and Fast Pointer Technique
diagrams.description: Shows how slow and fast pointers traverse to find middle element
elements: Middle node where slow meets fast end
diagrams.purpose: Understanding O(n) middle element finding without extra space

diagrams.title: Floyd's Cycle Detection
diagrams.description: Visual representation of cycle detection in linked list
elements: Meeting point of slow and fast
Fast pointer laps slow in cycle
Visual comparison of circular vs linear paths
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing cycle detection algorithm and understanding how meeting proves cycle existence

diagrams.title: Two Pointer Gap Method
diagrams.description: Finding nth node from end using gap technique
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how keeping n-node gap helps find nth from end in single traversal

diagrams.title: Linked List Reversal Process
elements: Link direction changes at each step
diagrams.purpose: Understanding iterative reversal with three pointer variables
